name: Puff-Top Bisque
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the courgettes and add them to the prawns.
2. Divide the mixture between two ovenproof soup cups that can hold 300ml (1/2 pint) of liquid.
3. Finely slice the onions and stir into the soup with the cream and enough lemon juice to sharpen the flavor.
4. Adjust seasoning as needed.
5. Lay a sheet of pastry over each soup cup, sealing the edges.
6. Trim excess pastry and flute the edges.
7. Brush the damp edge of the soup cups with milk.
8. Bake at 220°C (425°F) for mark 7, about 15 minutes.
9. Serve immediately.
